description: Informal note in Judaeo-Arabic addressed to al-Ḥedvat. Handwriting of Avraham Maimonides. Letter of recommendation for the poor man al-Shaykh al-Kohen al-Talmid Abū l-Riḍā.
tags: Avraham Maimonides, recommendation, Avraham Maimonides autograph
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
